title: Polished Reels & TikTok Video Edits
brief: I manage a growing presence on Instagram and TikTok and need a fast, reliable editor who can give each platform equal love. My feed leans toward a professional, polished look—clean cuts, tight pacing and on-brand color work—yet I still want it to feel current with phonk-style energy when the concept calls for it. Here’s the flow: I’ll send you raw vertical footage, a quick brief on the hook, reference links for any trending sounds or effects, and the desired runtime (usually 15–45 seconds). You handle the rest—trimming, smooth transitions, motion graphics, tasteful text animations, meticulous music syncing, and final color enhancement—so the clip ships in HD or Full HD, ready to post. Deliverables for each assignment • 1× final 9:16 MP4 (Instagram & TikTok ready) • Matching captions or on-screen text where needed • Exported thumbnail frame if the piece benefits from it • Source/project file so tweaks are easy down the line Turnaround is important; I aim for a 24–48 hour window on most pieces. My budget is lean, so efficient workflows and clear communication count just as much as flashy effects. If you have a reel or portfolio showing similar short-form work—especially anything with phonk edits—drop the link when you bid. Looking forward to collaborating on eye-catching, scroll-stopping videos that maintain a sharp, professional finish across both platforms.
